summary.title: Delivery range with recruiter-ready positioning
summary.description: {currentLabel} keeps the same career history but shifts the emphasis of the story. {alternateLabel} offers an alternate framing for a different hiring context.

skills.title: Modern delivery across product, platform, and operations
skills.description: A practical mix of backend, frontend, mobile, cloud, DevOps, and AI exposure for teams that need senior engineering ownership across the delivery lifecycle.

highlights.title: Project highlights distilled from delivery history
highlights.description: Selected accomplishments emphasize architecture decisions, platform delivery, automation, scale, and measurable business impact across recent roles.

experience.title: Chronological experience with platform depth
experience.description: Roles are listed chronologically to show progression from software engineering into solution architecture, technical leadership, and platform delivery.

education.title: Formal foundation
education.description: A concise education section keeps the resume focused on delivery history while preserving the academic context recruiters expect.

deployment.title: Senior engineer profile for architecture-led delivery
deployment.description: Best aligned with teams that need a hands-on technical lead who can connect architecture choices with implementation, automation, and reliable execution.
paragraphs: Works well in roles spanning solution architecture, senior software engineering, technical consulting, platform engineering, and cross-functional delivery leadership.
Brings a delivery style focused on clear technical direction, maintainable systems, automation, and practical collaboration between product, engineering, and operations.

a.label: Architecture & Delivery
a.focus: Solution architecture, delivery leadership, and platform execution
a.name: Lance Zheng
a.role: Solution Architect / Senior Software Engineer / Technical Lead
a.summary: Solution Architect / Senior Software Engineer / Technical Lead with 13+ years of experience designing and delivering web, mobile, and cloud platforms. Strong background in system architecture, technical leadership, CI/CD, platform engineering, and scalable business applications.
a.intro: The Architecture & Delivery profile is the baseline executive profile. It emphasizes architecture, technical leadership, and practical delivery across product, platform, and operations work without leaning too heavily on any single trend.
a.positioning: This framing works well when the audience is hiring for solution architecture, senior engineering leadership, or broad full-stack ownership across business-critical systems.
a.emphasisBody: A recruiter-friendly framing for architecture and delivery roles, with the AI-specific workflow language kept in the background.

highlights.title: Workforce Operations Platform Delivery
highlights.summary: Led frontend and cross-functional delivery for cloud platform services and a workforce operations platform spanning Angular, Flutter, Java, Kotlin, and C#.
highlights.outcome: Balanced architecture direction with execution planning so platform decisions translated into reliable team delivery.

highlights.title: Cloud CI/CD and Platform Automation
highlights.summary: Designed and implemented AWS and Azure deployment pipelines with GitLab, Kubernetes, Helm, and Terraform.
highlights.outcome: Improved deployment automation, release consistency, and operational scalability across cloud services.

highlights.title: Higher-Education B2B Cloud Services
highlights.summary: Built microservice-based B2B cloud services for higher education in the U.S. and enterprise training platforms in China.
highlights.outcome: Supported 10K+ concurrent users with less than 0.1% downtime across three data centers.

highlights.title: Android Financial Trading Platform
highlights.summary: Contributed to large-scale Android financial applications, including a stock trading app with more than one million active users.
highlights.outcome: Helped support a product that reached over 80% market share among brokers.

experience.title: Frontend Lead & Technical Consultant
bullets: Lead frontend and cross-functional technical delivery for cloud platform services and a workforce operations management platform, working across Angular, Flutter, Java, Kotlin, and C#.
Designed and implemented CI/CD pipelines on AWS and Azure using GitLab, Kubernetes, Helm, and Terraform to improve deployment automation, scalability, and development workflow efficiency.
Provided technical leadership in frontend architecture, implementation planning, and scrum-based execution to align delivery with platform and business needs.
Contributed to engineering workflow improvements through structured development practices, reusable guidance, and delivery automation.

experience.title: Solutions Architect
bullets: Designed cloud solutions for workforce operations using IoT, robotics, machine learning, backend services, and mobile applications across Node.js, Python, Go, Angular, React, MongoDB, MQTT, ROS, Flutter, and Android SDK.
Built CI/CD pipelines and supported server clustering and platform automation using Kubernetes, Helm, and Terraform to improve deployment reliability and operational scalability.
Participated in AIOps pipeline design and development using Kubeflow on Kubernetes together with tools and frameworks such as OpenCV and Darknet YOLO.
Worked across architecture, implementation, and platform delivery to translate emerging technical capabilities into practical business solutions.

experience.title: Senior Backend Developer & Tech Lead
bullets: Built B2B cloud services for higher education in the U.S. and enterprise training platforms in China using microservices architecture.
Supported workloads serving 10K+ concurrent users with less than 0.1% downtime across three data centers in the U.S., Taiwan, and China.
Led development activities in scrum-based teams and contributed to architecture, backend services, and platform reliability.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Contributed to Android mobile apps in the financial domain, including a stock trading app with over 1 million active users and more than 80% market share among brokers.
Worked on core software architecture and native Android application development in a large-scale production environment.

experience.title: Program Analysis
bullets: Contributed to product development and maintenance for knowledge management systems, web services, and mobile applications.
Worked primarily with C#, MS SQL, Elasticsearch, and IIS.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Built mobile applications, web backend services, and management platforms for a digital marketplace and app store service.
Integrated payment workflows with PayPal and telecom billing systems.

b.label: AI-Assisted Engineering
b.focus: Architecture leadership with AI-assisted engineering workflow emphasis
b.name: Lance Zheng
b.role: Solution Architect / Senior Software Engineer / Technical Lead
b.summary: Solution Architect / Senior Software Engineer / Technical Lead with 13+ years of experience designing and delivering web, mobile, and cloud platforms. Strong background in system architecture, technical leadership, CI/CD, platform engineering, scalable business applications, and AI-assisted development workflows.
b.intro: The AI-Assisted Engineering profile keeps the same delivery history but brings AI-assisted engineering, repository-native guidance, and developer productivity automation to the front of the story.
b.positioning: This framing is better suited to teams that want senior engineers who can combine architecture leadership with emerging workflow design, automation, and practical guardrails around AI usage.
b.emphasisBody: A sharper narrative for organizations that value structured AI workflows, reusable engineering guidance, and developer productivity improvements alongside core architecture work.

highlights.title: Repository-Native AI Guidance
highlights.summary: Designed reusable AI guidance and agent workflow patterns that support implementation, validation, and documentation tasks inside the engineering workflow.
highlights.outcome: Improved consistency, reduced ambiguity, and accelerated day-to-day delivery without dropping project-specific conventions.

highlights.title: Cloud CI/CD and Platform Automation
highlights.summary: Designed and implemented AWS and Azure pipelines with GitLab, Kubernetes, Helm, and Terraform for workforce operations platforms.
highlights.outcome: Created a stronger bridge between architecture intent, delivery automation, and production reliability.

highlights.title: AIOps and Applied ML Pipeline Work
highlights.summary: Participated in AIOps pipeline design and development using Kubeflow on Kubernetes together with OpenCV and Darknet YOLO.
highlights.outcome: Helped connect emerging ML capabilities with practical operational platform delivery.

highlights.title: Higher-Education B2B Cloud Services
highlights.summary: Built microservice-based B2B cloud services for higher education and enterprise training in multiple regions.
highlights.outcome: Sustained 10K+ concurrent users with less than 0.1% downtime across three data centers.

experience.title: Frontend Lead & Technical Consultant
bullets: Lead frontend and cross-functional technical delivery for cloud platform services and a workforce operations management platform, working across Angular, Flutter, Java, Kotlin, and C#.
Designed and implemented CI/CD pipelines on AWS and Azure using GitLab, Kubernetes, Helm, and Terraform to improve deployment automation, scalability, and development workflow efficiency.
Provided technical leadership in frontend architecture, implementation planning, and scrum-based execution to align delivery with platform and business needs.
Designed repository-native AI guidance and reusable agent workflows to support engineering tasks such as implementation, validation, and documentation.
Applied AI-assisted development practices to improve consistency, reduce ambiguity, and accelerate day-to-day software delivery while preserving project-specific conventions and guardrails.

experience.title: Solutions Architect
bullets: Designed cloud solutions for workforce operations using IoT, robotics, machine learning, backend services, and mobile applications across Node.js, Python, Go, Angular, React, MongoDB, MQTT, ROS, Flutter, and Android SDK.
Built CI/CD pipelines and supported server clustering and platform automation using Kubernetes, Helm, and Terraform to improve deployment reliability and operational scalability.
Participated in AIOps pipeline design and development using Kubeflow on Kubernetes together with tools and frameworks such as OpenCV and Darknet YOLO.
Worked across architecture, implementation, and platform delivery to translate emerging technical capabilities into practical business solutions.
Explored and applied AI/ML-enabled workflow design in operational platforms, helping bridge architecture decisions with practical implementation and delivery needs.

experience.title: Senior Backend Developer & Tech Lead
bullets: Built B2B cloud services for higher education in the U.S. and enterprise training platforms in China using microservices architecture.
Supported workloads serving 10K+ concurrent users with less than 0.1% downtime across three data centers in the U.S., Taiwan, and China.
Led development activities in scrum-based teams and contributed to architecture, backend services, and platform reliability.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Contributed to Android mobile apps in the financial domain, including a stock trading app with over 1 million active users and more than 80% market share among brokers.
Worked on core software architecture and native Android application development in a large-scale production environment.

experience.title: Program Analysis
bullets: Contributed to product development and maintenance for knowledge management systems, web services, and mobile applications.
Worked primarily with C#, MS SQL, Elasticsearch, and IIS.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Built mobile applications, web backend services, and management platforms for a digital marketplace and app store service.
Integrated payment workflows with PayPal and telecom billing systems.
